free_text: International Seminar on high ions physics, Dubna,
Experiments on the spontaneous fission gamma photons
from Cm-248, Cf-252, Cf-254, Fm-256,and Md-259 .
Fm-256 was obtained as decay product of Md-256,produced
at radiation of Bk-249 with Ne-22 ion beam in U-300
Md-259 and Cf-254 were produced at irradiation of
- Cf-254 was separated chemically from actinide
Set of eight scintillation detectors on the base
of bismuth-germanite Bi4Ge3O12 crystals of 36 mm
diameter, 140mm long. Gamma-quanta were registered in
energy range of 320 - 5120 keV during 4 microsec
Response function of this set was defined
experimentally by gamma-sources of Zn-65 (1115 keV),
Y-88 (898, 1836 keV), Pu-Be ( 4.43 MeV) and also was
compared with calculated ( 80 keV bin) one using Monte-
scintillators during 4 microsec after FF registration.

from 1 to 8 gamma-quanta and common gamma-spectrum
